title: National behaviour survey report: 2024 to 2025 academic year
body: "This report presents the findings from the fourth national behaviour survey for the 2024 to 2025 academic year. It covers:   school behaviour culture and policy behaviour management school environment and experience frequency and impact of misbehaviour   The national behaviour survey report covers schools in England, including:   primary and secondary local-authority-maintained schools primary and secondary academies and free schools all-through local-authority-maintained schools all-through academies special schools   We collected the data from multiple respondent groups, including:   school leaders teachers pupils parents and carers    Read our:   previous national behaviour survey reports  school survey reports and data    School behaviour survey and research team  Email: BAEA.Research@education.gov.uk "
